title: geum strictum var. decurrens
intro: Geum strictum var. decurrens, also known as the creeping avens, is a perennial plant species within the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Geum strictum var. decurrens can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, with some herbalists also using the plant in salves and ointments for topical application.
